'''竏喘-dh-k-j''' ('''kabadhkejoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:rufie|rufie]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-dh-k-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:rufie|rufie]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 竏喘-dh-k-j
|-
! Lemma
| kabadhkejoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thibadhkejoko|thibadhkejoko]] || [[word:jibadhkejoko|jibadhkejoko]] || [[word:shibadhkejoko|shibadhkejoko]] || [[word:kibadhkejoko|kibadhkejoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthubadhkejoko|thuthubadhkejoko]] || [[word:jujubadhkejoko|jujubadhkejoko]] || [[word:shushubadhkejoko|shushubadhkejoko]] || [[word:kukubadhkejoko|kukubadhkejoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thubadhkejoko|thubadhkejoko]] || [[word:jubadhkejoko|jubadhkejoko]] || [[word:shubadhkejoko|shubadhkejoko]] || [[word:kubadhkejoko|kubadhkejoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thubadhkejoko|thubadhkejoko]] || [[word:jubadhkejoko|jubadhkejoko]] || [[word:shubadhkejoko|shubadhkejoko]] || [[word:kubadhkejoko|kubadhkejoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thebadhkejoko|thebadhkejoko]] || [[word:jebadhkejoko|jebadhkejoko]] || [[word:shebadhkejoko|shebadhkejoko]] || [[word:kebadhkejoko|kebadhkejoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothobadhkejoko|thothobadhkejoko]] || [[word:jojobadhkejoko|jojobadhkejoko]] || [[word:shoshobadhkejoko|shoshobadhkejoko]] || [[word:kokobadhkejoko|kokobadhkejoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thobadhkejoko|thobadhkejoko]] || [[word:jobadhkejoko|jobadhkejoko]] || [[word:shobadhkejoko|shobadhkejoko]] || [[word:kobadhkejoko|kobadhkejoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thobadhkejoko|thobadhkejoko]] || [[word:jobadhkejoko|jobadhkejoko]] || [[word:shobadhkejoko|shobadhkejoko]] || [[word:kobadhkejoko|kobadhkejoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thﾃｦbadhkejoko|thﾃｦbadhkejoko]] || [[word:jﾃｦbadhkejoko|jﾃｦbadhkejoko]] || [[word:shﾃｦbadhkejoko|shﾃｦbadhkejoko]] || [[word:kﾃｦbadhkejoko|kﾃｦbadhkejoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathabadhkejoko|thathabadhkejoko]] || [[word:jajabadhkejoko|jajabadhkejoko]] || [[word:shashabadhkejoko|shashabadhkejoko]] || [[word:kakabadhkejoko|kakabadhkejoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thabadhkejoko|thabadhkejoko]] || [[word:jabadhkejoko|jabadhkejoko]] || [[word:shabadhkejoko|shabadhkejoko]] || [[word:kabadhkejoko|kabadhkejoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thabadhkejoko|thabadhkejoko]] || [[word:jabadhkejoko|jabadhkejoko]] || [[word:shabadhkejoko|shabadhkejoko]] || [[word:kabadhkejoko|kabadhkejoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shabadhkejithi|shabadhkejithi]] || [[word:shabadhkejiji|shabadhkejiji]] || [[word:shabadhkejishi|shabadhkejishi]] || [[word:shabadhkejiki|shabadhkejiki]]
|-

|}
